description:
GovClose CERTIFICATION: https://www.govclose.com/sales-certification

Former acquisitions officer Rick Howard shows you how to use agency forecasts, industry days, and OTA portals to identify high-value federal contract leads before your competitors ever see them.

Connect with Richard C. Howard
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/govclose

Watch next:
Ruin a GovCon consulting business from anywhere:
https://youtu.be/9ssNjSwx8n0

🔥 Want to become a certified federal sales executive or consultant?
Visit 👉 https://www.govclose.com

#GovClose #GovernmentContracts #PublicSectorSalessalesteam #AcquisitionStrategy #SmallBusinessGovCon #SDVOSB

00:41 Essential Positions and Their Roles

24:59 Proposal Writing and Legal Considerations

42:31 Pricing Analysts and Teaming Partners
44:50 Building Effective Partnerships

01:05:28 Consulting Business and Virtual Assistants
01:08:52 Conclusion and Final Thoughts
